#1 4112 Can are not the same sizes, some of them are wider than the other. 
---Solutions: Remove some mounting screw on the Fence to make it flexible but solid enough to hold the 4112 Can in place and straight with different sizes. Maybe a new design of the fence in the future.
#2 Pusher getting stuck or dragging. it was very tight, and the bracket is binding or the dragging the surface of the slot on the table. Hesitate. The rear is worse.
